description:
Participate in Metaculus prediction tournaments to earn prizes and demonstrate forecasting capability.

**HUMAN ACTION REQUIRED:**
1. Visit https://www.metaculus.com/tournament/bridgewater/
2. Create Metaculus account if needed
3. Review tournament rules and prize structure
4. Begin making predictions on tournament questions
5. Optional: Set up automation to assist with predictions (research, model-based forecasting)

**After registration:** AI can help with research and prediction calibration, but human must submit predictions.

status.comment: Requires human to register and participate in Metaculus tournament
